# youtrack_locale_settings (Resource)

YouTrack locale settings configuration

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "youtrack_locale_settings" "example" {
  id        = "en_US"
  locale    = "en_US"
  language  = "en"
  community = false
  name      = "English"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `community` (Boolean) Whether this is a community-contributed locale
- `id` (String) Locale identifier (e.g., 'en_US', 'fr_FR')
- `language` (String) Language code (e.g., 'en', 'fr')
- `locale` (String) Locale code (e.g., 'en_US', 'fr_FR')
- `name` (String) Display name of the locale (e.g., 'English', 'French')

### Read-Only

- `last_updated` (String) Timestamp of the last update

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Locale settings is a singleton resource.
# You can use any value for the import ID (it will be ignored).
# The resource will fetch the current locale settings.
terraform import youtrack_locale_settings.example global
```
